return(function(G,d,g,e,I,Q,H,p,D,J,X,V,T,k,m,s,y,z,A,h,j,i,u)y,m,D,A,k,z,s,J,p,X,u,h,i,T,j,V={},-920793-(-920793),function(G,x)local d=V(x)local g=function(g,e,I)return s(G,{g;e,I},x,d)end return g d=V(x)local g=function()return s(G,{},x,d)end return g end,function(G,x)local d=V(x)local g=function(g)return s(G,{g},x,d)end return g end,function(G)for x=262803+-262802,#G,876238+-876237 do
